/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,liblivox_ros_driver2__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o liblivox_ros_driver2__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/livox_interfaces2__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/livox_ros_driver2/msg/custom_point__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livox_interfaces2__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/livox_ros_driver2/msg/custom_msg__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/CNF2025495045/workspace/nav_for_4WS/src/fast_lio/depends/ws_livox/build/livox_ros_driver2:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: liblivox_ros_driver2__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
